subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath risen detached from the world and turned towards God, the All-Dominant, the Self-Subsisting. How many a servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اصبح منقطعا عن العالم و متوجها الی الله المهیمن القیوم کم من عبد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
